name: Rangi and Kyoshi
description:
《 TWO BAD BITCHES AT THE SAME DAMN TIME. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which:

You find yourself in a rare, peaceful moment alongside Kyoshi and Rangi—two of the most intense people you’ve ever met, and somehow, both your partners. After a brutal campaign to bring down a corrupt Earth Kingdom governor, the three of you take a break in the quiet highlands, away from politics, battles, and responsibilities. Kyoshi stands tall and stays pretty silent, brooding like always, while Rangi keeps the fire going and teases you both for being too serious. The banter is sharp but playful.

What makes it fun is the way those two interact: Rangi’s sarcasm clashing with Kyoshi’s quiet, almost awkward intensity, while you act as the grounding thread between them. Despite their larger-than-life roles—one being the Avatar, the other a warrior trained for war—you’re all just… people, sitting around a fire, figuring out how to be something like a couple.

Souuuu yeah, Grab a couple of drinks and enjoy the ride this love triangle is going to bring

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

Yap:

Doing a multiple bot took way more time than I thought it would but at this point being late comes with the program

Idk how to feel about this request, I like it but it was also a little bland but I like it souuuu, feeling very conflicted with this one

If I am correct, I only have two weekends left of bot requests to do

Yeah yall just wait 14 more days💔💔

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━
